title: T-034 — ROOT: Brief module UI group (Brief list + Brief detail)
prompt:
# T-034 — Brief module UI group (root/workflow descriptor)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §9.2 + UX brief_list + brief_detail
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx (brief_list 7-82, brief_detail 84-231)

## Goal (root)
This is a ROOT/WORKFLOW descriptor — it is NOT executable on its own. It describes the Brief module UI group at route `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs` and enumerates the atomic slice tasks that implement each page plus the wiring and parity tasks that finalize the group.

## Shared route
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/page.tsx` — list page (RSC) hosting BriefListTable
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/[id]/page.tsx` — detail page (RSC) hosting BriefDetailForm (Client)
- Shared Brief data (status, linked project, current_gate) flows from each page into its component as props; row click navigates from list to detail; back/breadcrumbs return.

## Slices under this root
- **T-119** — Brief list page (`brief_list`, brief-screens.jsx:7-82): table of briefs with status badges, search/filter, create button triggers BriefCreateModal
- **T-120** — Brief detail page (`brief_detail`, brief-screens.jsx:84-231): RHF form with all PRD fields, save/submit actions, status timeline sidebar

## Wiring & parity
- **T-121** — WIRING: brief list → detail navigation + data flow under `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/` (back, breadcrumbs)
- **T-122** — PARITY: Playwright screenshot parity vs brief-screens.jsx for list + detail; 0 axe violations

## How to use this root
Do not implement code from this task. Instead, dispatch the slice tasks T-119 and T-120 (parallel-safe with each other), then T-121 (wiring), then T-122 (parity). Each slice has a narrow `scope_files` and references its prototype range.

## 2026-05-03 E2E spine patch — Brief UI must navigate to Project, not FA
Brief list/detail must surface the linked NPD project (DEV-123, current gate, release status) as the canonical next artefact. Convert/Complete CTA must say 'Complete brief for project' or equivalent. FG/Finished Good appears only as pending G3 mapping; FA only as legacy alias if absolutely required by compatibility routes. This applies to T-119 and T-120 slices.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement any page UI in this root task
- Do not send users from Brief completion directly to FA Core as canonical flow
- Do not use FA/Factory Article as primary user-facing term
